metadata.description: Production-grade Claude Code harness with quality-gate hooks, 19 curated skills, 9 rules, and a 5-phase development workflow.

plugins.name: claude-code-mastery
plugins.description: The definitive Claude Code setup and configuration package. Includes quality-gate hooks (git safety, config protection, dev-server blocking, console.log warnings), strategic compaction, MCP health checks, verification loop, agent introspection debugging, and 19 curated skills spanning dashboards, presentations, security testing, TDD, and more.
